instruction: Explain what a Large Language Model is.
response: A Large Language Model is a neural network trained on massive amounts of text to understand and generate human language.
Prompt Engineering is the practice of designing prompts that guide a language model to produce accurate and useful responses.
A Transformer is a deep learning architecture that uses self-attention to process sequences efficiently.
Self-attention allows each token to attend to every other token in a sequence to capture contextual relationships.
Fine-tuning is the process of training a pretrained language model on a task-specific dataset.
Tokenization converts raw text into tokens that language models can process.
GPT-2 is an autoregressive transformer language model developed for text generation.

instruction: What is Temperature in text generation?
response: Temperature controls the randomness of generated text. Lower values make outputs more deterministic while higher values increase creativity.
Top-k sampling limits token selection to the k most probable next tokens.
Top-p sampling selects the smallest set of tokens whose cumulative probability exceeds a threshold.
